zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich von Vianden於大約1248年出生在艾歐洛時，他的父親Friedrich von Vianden28歲，母親Cäcilie von Schönecken46歲。他和Jutta VON BLANKENHEIM至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1291年享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich von Vianden于大约1248年出生在艾歐洛时，他的父亲Friedrich von Vianden28岁，母亲Cäcilie von Schönecken46岁。他和Jutta VON BLANKENHEIM至少有1个儿子。他去世于大约1291年享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich von Vianden was born about 1248, in Europe, his father, Friedrich von Vianden, was 28 and his mother, Cäcilie von Schönecken, was 46. He had at least 1 son with Jutta VON BLANKENHEIM. He died about 1291, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich von Vianden est né environ 1248, à Europe, son père, Friedrich von Vianden, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Cäcilie von Schönecken, avait 46 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Jutta VON BLANKENHEIM. Il est décédé environ 1291, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich von Vianden um 1248 in Europa geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich von Vianden 28 und seine Mutter Cäcilie von Schönecken 46. Er hatte mit Jutta VON BLANKENHEIM mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1291 im Alter von 45 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich von Vianden è nato il circa 1248 nel Europa, il suo padre, Friedrich von Vianden, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Cäcilie von Schönecken, aveva 46 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Jutta VON BLANKENHEIM. Morì circa 1291, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.Vianden, Luxembourg: ルクセンブルクヴィアンデン

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich von Viandenが約1248年にヨーロッパで生まれた時，父Friedrich von Viandenは28歳，母Cäcilie von Schöneckenは46歳であった。彼はJutta VON BLANKENHEIMとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1291年に45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich von Vianden(이)가 대략 1248년 우럽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich von Vianden(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Cäcilie von Schönecken(은)는 46세였다. 그는 Jutta VON BLANKENHEIM(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1291년 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.environ 1248–environ 1291: tany ho any amin'ny 1248–tany ho any amin'ny 1291

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich von Vianden nasceu aproximadamente 1248, em Europa, seu pai, Friedrich von Vianden, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Cäcilie von Schönecken, tinha 46 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Jutta VON BLANKENHEIM. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1291, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich von Vianden родился около 1248 г. в местности Европа, его отцу по имени Friedrich von Vianden было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Cäcilie von Schönecken, 46. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Jutta VON BLANKENHEIM. Он умер около 1291 г. в возрасте 45 лет.

sm.environ 1248–environ 1291: e tusa o le 1248–e tusa o le 1291

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich von Vianden nació aproximadamente 1248, en Europa, su papá, Friedrich von Vianden, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Cäcilie von Schönecken, tenía 46 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Jutta VON BLANKENHEIM. Murió aproximadamente 1291, a la edad de 45 años.
